text.message: I always find such anticipations irritating
4 ore just hurts me but ok
You took one for the team mb
but went 6511 to try to stop him a little bit
no road materials, will get there by the end of the game lol
Haha, red wins is a funny statement
why are yall giving him so much when he is in the lead
no one is gonna work with last player?
I say the one who wins this game is the one who works with me
I just want my 1% to become 5%
I will block you for the rest of the game oj
red, I will join the other two and just let you win
since thats what we are doing here
I dont get whats wrong with this table
Im in the worst position ever, not getting trades and getting robbed
blue is in the greatest position of history and acting like a child
bro I am not even saying I am in a bad position. But DO YOU SEE RED?????
yes I see, and u are still ahead
u see, red stole from me in the worst position
I have no incentive to play
but Im a man and keep playing like one
I wont have a city this game
u receive 2 blocks and act like a child
even though u are in a clear lead
u guys should help me pop
if u want to win the game
to buy a dev and protect army
getting road is the only way to save the game
u rage blocked oj too much while having your drama, and then traded red a city... imagine if u didnt do that, u would have already won
some players will be always limited... he might be losing around 10 to 15 games a season because of that. He might still win this one, but so sad
Lol you take army possibly for a win
not really played well by you
But red was supposed to win blue?
but I'll be in top 10 this season
u almost lost the most won game in the century
how will you be in top 10
Blue had to cry and then get lucky to win hahahah
I've been there before everytime I play 100 more games
u almost lost the most won game ever
